trending_videos.title: SPIDERMAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Every Easter Egg & Detail You Missed!
trending_videos.description:
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer FRAME BY FRAME Breakdown & Analysis by New Rockstars’ Erik Voss! Get 10% off your first month of therapy at https://betterhelp.com/NewRockstars. #spiderman #spidermanbrandnewday #trailer  #sponsored

Here is EVERYTHING you missed in the trailer for Spider-Man Brand New Day (2026) - every clue for the MUTANTS, Jean Grey, even ROGUE?? What was removed from this trailer? Will Daredevil appear in this movie? Will Norman Osborn? Will Bruce Banner’s “savage” Hulk form? How will this movie set up Avengers Doomsday and Secret Wars? Erik Voss breaks down this trailer frame by frame for every callback to Andrew Garfield Spider-Man and Tobey Maguire Spider-Man and why these callbacks are so important to what’s really happening to Tom Holland Peter Parker in this movie!

We're back at the UCB Theater in Los Angeles on April 17th, come in person or stream anywhere. Tickets: https://ucbcomedy.com/show/new-rockstars-live-its-morbin-time

NEW ROCKSTARS NETWORK
youtube.

spider-man brand new day trailer reaction

trending_videos.title: First Round: Pennsylvania vs. Illinois
trending_videos.description: The No. 3 Illinois Fighting Illini and the No. 14 Pennsylvania Quakers meet in the first round of the 2026 NCAA Tournament. This South Region matchup takes place at the Bon Secours Wellness Arena and the winner will advance to the second round.

trending_videos.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
A Brand New Day starts now.
Watch the official trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, exclusively in theatres July 31. Play Marvel’s Spider-Man 2, available now in the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog.

trending_videos.title: First Round: Texas vs. BYU
trending_videos.description: The Cougars face the Longhorns in the NCAA West Region first round at the Moda Center. BYU has a strong non-conference record and looks to beat Texas. Texas enters fresh off a 68-66 win against NC State in the First Four on Mar. 17.

trending_videos.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 4 | Title Reveal (2027 Movie) - Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz, Kristen Bell

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

trending_videos.title: First Round: Texas A&M vs. Saint Mary's (Calif.)
trending_videos.description: No. 10 Aggies and No. 7 Gaels play in round one of the NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament. Texas A&M enters the postseason focused on a deep run. Saint Mary's counters with precision half-court execution in this highly anticipated tournament showdown.

trending_videos.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

trending_videos.title: The Will Cain Show
trending_videos.description: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

trending_videos.title: Off Campus - Official Teaser Trailer | Prime Video
trending_videos.description:
A college soap based on Elle Kennedy’s bestselling book series, the first season of OFF CAMPUS follows the unlikely romance between wry, hockey-hating music major Hannah Wells and Briar U’s womanizing star center Garrett Graham as they strike a deal to help each other out. But will their deal unfold as expected?

trending_videos.title: First Round: Virginia Tech vs. Oregon
trending_videos.description: The Virginia Tech Hokies face the Oregon Ducks in the Fort Worth Regional 3 first round. After a dominant run in the Big Ten, guard Katie Fiso leads Oregon with 15.3 points per game. Virginia Tech enters as a dangerous seed from the ACC.

notable_patterns.insight: Spider-Man content is highly engaging, suggesting a strong viewer interest in superhero and franchise-related content.
Sports matchups, especially during tournament seasons, have a consistent viewership.
Teaser and trailer content for anticipated movies like 'Dune: Part Three' and 'Sonic the Hedgehog 4' is popular, indicating strong interest in upcoming cinematic releases.

creator_patterns.insight: Channels with a focus on specific niches, such as movie analysis and sports broadcasting, are consistently reaching the trending list.

emerging_trends.opportunity: Develop content around superhero franchises and analyze upcoming releases to capture audience interest.
Create engaging sports commentary or highlight reels, especially around major tournaments or popular matchups.
Capitalize on the excitement for upcoming movie releases by producing analysis, reviews, or reaction videos.

growth_recommendations.recommendation: Collaborate with popular analysis channels like New Rockstars to enhance visibility in entertainment content.
Engage with sports audiences by producing content that complements live sports broadcasts, such as pre-game analyses or post-game discussions.
Leverage the interest in new movie trailers by creating exclusive first-look content or behind-the-scenes features.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
